About Us

Take the stress out of your roofing project

From repairs to full roof replacements, we treat each home as our own. At Boardman Roofing we've earned an excellent reputation in our local area as a professional, expert roofing company — the majority of our work earned through word-of-mouth recommendations.

Learn more
Our Mission ▾

With 20 years of industry experience, our skilled team is dedicated to delivering top roofing services. We prioritise durability, quality and safety, and take great pride in the craftsmanship behind everything we put our name to.

Our Vision ▾

To remain the roofing company Worsley, Swinton and Manchester trust first — known for being punctual, efficient and great value, with a reputation built entirely on satisfied customers.

Our Values ▾

We put the customer first in everything we do, regardless of the size or complexity of the job — maintaining an excellent standard of workmanship on every single project.

New Roofs

Complete re-roofs built to last. With 20 years of experience we oversee your project from start to completion, and to an exceptional standard.

  • Full re-roofs & new builds
  • Quality materials, built to last
  • Managed start to completion
Get a free quote
How We Work

A no-obligation quote in three simple steps

01

Contact our team

Get in touch by phone or our enquiry form and tell us about your roofing project — we're happy to answer any and all queries.

02

Receive your quote

We'll provide a no-obligation quote and arrange a scheduled visit date that suits you.

03

We get to work

Our highly qualified team will provide a solution to any roofing problem — punctual, efficient and great value.
